details: Comprehensive coverage on engine, transmission and core electrical systems, backed by certified BMW technicians.
Audi Advantage warranty covering major mechanical and electronic components with genuine parts guarantee.
Extended powertrain protection covering engine, transmission and drivetrain for total peace of mind off-road or on.
Industry-leading bumper-to-bumper coverage across the full vehicle, including electrical and infotainment systems.
Comprehensive coverage backed by Carrio Motors' certified service centre and genuine parts supply chain.
Standard Suzuki manufacturer warranty covering engine, transmission and electrical systems, serviced at Carrio Motors.
